computerReply: Lieutenant Barclay is on holodeck three.
situationalContext: La Forge is in Engineering, looking for Lieutenant Barclay.

computerReply: There is no such device on file.
situationalContext: Barclay is on the holodeck, attempting to create a new neural-scan interface.
userQuery: Computer, begin new programme. Create as follows, workstation chair. Now, create a standard alphanumeric console positioned for left hand. Now an iconic display console positioned for right hand. Tie both consoles into the Enterprise main computer core, utilising neural-scan interface.

computerReply: A neural interface was created to expedite the repairs.
situationalContext: On the Bridge, Captain Picard asks the computer how the Argus reactors were shut down.
userQuery: Computer, how were the Argus reactors shut down?

computerReply: I am responding, sir. I'm sorry if I caused you any alarm. It was necessary in order to secure the Array.
situationalContext: On the Bridge, Captain Picard demands a further response from the computer.
